text:
FFS coverage 

COMMENT: The CCW’s chronic condition indicator variables require beneficiaries to satisfy both claims criteria (a 
minimum number/type of claims that have the proper diagnosis codes and occurred within a specified 
time period) and coverage criteria (FFS Part A and Part B coverage during the entire specified time 
period). 

For breast cancer, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient or skilled nursing facility (SNF) claim,
